meta.title: Kit — Everyday tools in the browser
meta.description: A private, client-side utility toolkit for PDF, images, media, converters, and text. Files never leave your device.

brand.name: Kit
brand.tagline: Everyday tools in the browser. Private by design.

footer.copyright: © {year} Tim G (TGthms). Kit is open source under MIT.

common.fileTooLarge: This file is large and may be slow to process.
common.clientSideOnly: Runs entirely in your browser. Files are not uploaded to a server.

home.title: What do you need to do?
home.subtitle: Private tools that run on your device. No account. No upload.
home.chooseCategoryHint: Pick a group of tools to get started—or search across everything.

categories.pdfDesc: Merge, split, compress, watermark, and more
categories.imageDesc: Compress, resize, convert, and adjust images
categories.mediaDesc: Convert, trim, and extract audio from video
categories.textDesc: Format, validate, encode, and compare text

history.title: History
history.subtitle: Recent actions on this device. Only metadata is stored—never your files.
history.empty: No history yet. Use a tool to get started.
history.clearConfirm: Clear all history entries on this device?

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.subtitle: Tools you pinned for quick access.
favorites.empty: No favorites yet. Pin tools from the home page or a tool page.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Preferences stay on this device.
settings.clearHistoryDesc: Remove all local history metadata from this browser.
settings.privacyNote: Kit processes files in your browser. Preferences and history metadata may be stored locally. See the Privacy Policy for details.

pdf-merge.name: PDF Merge
pdf-merge.description: Combine PDFs with thumbnails and drag-to-reorder.
pdf-merge.empty: Add two or more PDF files to merge.

pdf-split.name: PDF Split
pdf-split.description: Extract page ranges into a new PDF.

pdf-compress.name: PDF Compress
pdf-compress.description: Reduce size by re-encoding page images (lossy).
pdf-compress.note: Lossy: pages may be rasterized. Best for image-heavy PDFs.

pdf-watermark.name: PDF Watermark
pdf-watermark.description: Add text watermark, header, or footer.

pdf-redact.name: PDF Redact
pdf-redact.description: Cover regions with black boxes (visual cover).
pdf-redact.note: Visual cover only—does not guarantee removal of all underlying text streams.

pdf-extract.name: PDF Extract
pdf-extract.description: Extract text or embedded images from a PDF.

image-compress.name: Image Compress
image-compress.description: Shrink images with quality and dimension controls.
image-compress.keywords: image compress jpg png webp size

image-resize.name: Image Resize
image-resize.description: Resize images with optional aspect lock.

image-crop.name: Image Crop
image-crop.description: Crop images to a custom region.

image-convert.name: Image Convert
image-convert.description: Convert between JPG, PNG, WEBP, and more.
image-convert.keywords: image convert format webp avif png jpg

image-metadata.name: Strip Metadata
image-metadata.description: Re-export images without EXIF and other metadata.
image-metadata.note: Re-encodes pixels via canvas; embedded metadata is dropped.

media-convert.name: Media Convert
media-convert.description: Convert audio/video formats in the browser (FFmpeg).
media-convert.keywords: video audio convert mp4 webm mp3
media-convert.note: Uses FFmpeg WASM (single-threaded). Large files may be slow; codec support is limited.

media-trim.name: Media Trim
media-trim.description: Cut a clip with start/end times.

media-extract-audio.name: Extract Audio
media-extract-audio.description: Pull audio track from a video file.

convert-hub.name: Smart Convert
convert-hub.description: Detect input type and convert to a matching format.
convert-hub.keywords: convert hub smart batch json yaml csv zip

csv-json.name: CSV ↔ JSON
csv-json.description: Convert tabular data between CSV and JSON.

text-diff.name: Text Diff
text-diff.description: Compare two texts line by line.

base64.name: Base64
base64.description: Encode or decode Base64 for text and files.
